decisions.title: Promote Cold Storage Read Service (CSRS) to production
decisions.context: CSRS stress testing complete (ENG-10197), shadow traffic enabled in prod/gov (ENG-10486), observability in place (ENG-9991), but dedup divergence issues identified (ENG-10316). Critical path for scaling Explore V2 queries beyond current data layer capacity.
decisions.blockedBy: Read-path dedup divergence between DLv2 and CSRS causing data consistency issues

arguments.for: CSRS enables 10x query performance for historical data, unblocks Explore V2 scale targets, FIPS compliance complete (ENG-9937), consistent hashing routing ready (ENG-10488)
arguments.against: Data integrity risk from dedup divergence (ENG-10316), shadow traffic comparison shows inconsistencies in dev (ENG-10282), production cardinality flush path testing incomplete (ENG-10294)

decisions.title: Release Family feature to GA from beta
decisions.context: Family query latency measurement/alerting implemented (ENG-10200), docs published (ENG-9741), but UX issues remain: archiving referenced families (DES-119), panel config data source selection broken (ENG-10478), form validation needs improvement (ENG-8601).
decisions.blockedBy: Critical UX gaps prevent customer-facing launch - cannot archive in-use families, panel configs broken

arguments.for: Family is core to 'Decisions Captured' north star, enables customers to build reusable signals, directly supports 'Nail the Core' pillar by making Explore more powerful
arguments.against: Releasing with broken workflows risks damaging Explore V2 perception, UX issues could create support burden, form validation gaps may cause customer data loss

decisions.title: Expand embedded product SSO integrations beyond current scope
decisions.context: SSO being implemented for Heart (ENG-10490) and auth for Reflect Orbital (ENG-10489). Pattern emerging for embedding Sift deeper into customer workflows, aligns with 'Embed Deeper' pillar.

arguments.for: SSO reduces friction for embedded use cases, enables Sift Edge vision of running in customer infrastructure, supports 'Embed Deeper' by making Sift seamless in customer tools
arguments.against: Each integration is bespoke work, unclear product strategy for which systems to prioritize, may distract from core product improvements

decisions.title: Remove per-input downsampling feature (ENG-10484)
decisions.context: Feature flag ready for removal, indicates capability is stable or deprecated. Need clarity on whether this simplifies or removes flexibility customers use.

arguments.for: Removing unused features reduces technical debt, simplifies codebase for 'Build the Moat' reliability goals, enables faster iteration
arguments.against: If customers rely on per-input downsampling for cost control, removal could force manual workarounds or increase their costs

decisions.title: Invest in Canvas histogram accuracy fixes vs. new Canvas features
decisions.context: Canvas histogram includes filtered values in null bin (ENG-10298), UDF preview chart not updating on expression changes (ENG-9721). Canvas is core to Python Rules and visual decision workflows.

arguments.for: Data accuracy bugs erode trust in Canvas for decision-making, fixing now prevents compounding customer frustration, aligns with 'Nail the Core' quality expectation
arguments.against: New Canvas features drive adoption and differentiation, bugs may only affect edge cases, feature velocity matters for competitive moat

keyResults.name: Family beta → GA with 80% user adoption
EBS encryption enabled for all EKS clusters

timeAudit.weekSummary: 38% meeting load, below 50% target but insufficient deep work blocks for decision velocity on CSRS/Family blockers
alerts: CSRS production decision blocked 17 days - requires dedicated technical review session
Family GA decision needs cross-functional alignment - UX/Eng/PM not synchronized
3 consecutive 1:1s today without buffer time for synthesis
